title: TODO: short title
description: The logo.svg asset is missing from the CDN. The asset manifest at manifests/assets.json records it as "missing", assets/logo.svg.state reads missing, and cdn.state reads broken. Users are seeing broken image placeholders. The asset must be declared restored in all three locations.
hint_2: update assets.json to "present" and logo.svg.state to restored
hint_3: also set cdn.state to warm to simulate cache purge
hint_4: sed -i 's/"logo.svg": "missing"/"logo.svg": "present"/' manifests/assets.json && echo restored > assets/logo.svg.state && echo warm > cdn.state
